<?php namespace Aws\KinesisVideoWebRTCStorage; use Aws\AwsClient; /** * This client is used to interact with the **Amazon Kinesis Video WebRTC Storage** service. * @method \Aws\Result joinStorageSession(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise joinStorageSessionAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result joinStorageSessionAsViewer(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise joinStorageSessionAsViewerAsync(array $args = []) */ class KinesisVideoWebRTCStorageClient extends AwsClient {}
